description: This endpoint bulk creates a batch of Actual Production Quantities (APQ).

description.description: The description of the Actual Production Quantity

unit_of_measure.description: The unit of measure the Actual Production Quantity was created with

timesheet_id.description: The Timesheet ID the Actual Production Quantity was created with

updated_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was updated

created_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was created

deleted_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was deleted

date.description: Date the actual production quantity was installed (YYYY-MM-DD)

403.description: User does not have permission to create Actual Production Quantities

description.description: The description of the Actual Production Quantity

wbs_code_id.description: The Production Quantity Code for the Actual Production Quantity. This is necessary if your project is configured for Task Codes. DO NOT provide if your project is not configured for Task Codes.

cost_code_id.description: The Cost Code ID for the Actual Production Quantity. DO NOT provide if your project is configured for Task Codes.

crew_id.description: The Crew ID for the Actual Production Quantity

location_id.description: The Location ID for the Actual Production Quantity

timesheet_id.description: The Timesheet ID for the Actual Production Quantity. If the 'timesheet_id' is provided in the request, then the date for the timesheet will be associated with the production quantity, regardless of...

sub_job_id.description: The Sub Job ID for the Actual Production Quantity. DO NOT provide if your project is configured for Task Codes.
